title: oxalis physocalyx
intro: Oxalis physocalyx, also known as the South African wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oxalis physocalyx are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, which can contribute to various diseases. Oxalis physocalyx can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also sometimes used in traditional remedies, such as a poultice or salve, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
